mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Choose a second factor to verify your identity.

totp_challenge.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

totp_enroll.title: Set up authenticator app
totp_enroll.scan_instructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, Bitwarden, 1Password, …)
totp_enroll.confirm_instructions: Enter the 6-digit code shown by the app to confirm setup.

missing_state.description: You are not authorized to access the page. Please go back to your application and retry to sign-in.
missing_state.details: A state issued by the authorization server must be passed as query param.

unknown.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please go back to your application and retry to sign-in.
